main.version: v1.4 The Long Vigil (3-act campaign, deck drafts/scars, villain Nul, relic cards)

coop.version: v1.0 Twin Vigils (linked duels, same seed, status sync + beacons)
coop.build: same assets + coop-logic.js as logic.js + index.html with window.__COOP__=true (see scratchpad build step; rebuild: sed title/__COOP__ into index.html, cp coop-logic.js logic.js)

note: To update either game: zip, media_upload, PUT, media_confirm(file), deploy_game WITH that game_id. Never omit game_id on update.
